cause_analysis.narrative: Massage Bliss churned on 2026-04-18 after 59 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 21-day silence starting 2026-01-07. Classification: silent drift — 51 days silent at churn, 1 inbound vs 13 outbound in the last 90d. No complaint on record; engagement simply faded.
recommendations: [Re-engagement] Trigger automated re-engagement playbook when silence crosses 21 days. This customer was already past that threshold with no outreach logged.
[Health score] Silent drift is the most predictable churn type. Build an engagement-health score and alert AMs weekly on the bottom decile.
